hero.title: J&R Footwear
hero.subtitle: Quality and Style at Your Reach
hero.description: We are a Colombian factory specialized in the production of high-quality national footwear for your business. With over 5 years of experience, we are dedicated to offering you the best products.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Find the perfect footwear for every style and occasion.
categories.caballeroDesc: Elegant and comfortable footwear for men. From sports shoes to casual ones.
categories.damaDesc: Modern and sophisticated designs for women. Style and comfort in every model.
categories.infantilDesc: Durable and comfortable footwear for kids. Fun and quality in every step.

asesoria.title: Need Personalized Advice?
asesoria.subtitle: Our team is available to help you find the ideal footwear for your business.

benefits.varietyDesc: Large catalog of models for all tastes and occasions.
benefits.sizesDesc: Availability in all sizes, from 21 to 43.
benefits.qualityDesc: First-choice materials with high quality standards.
benefits.warrantyDesc: All our products come with a warranty.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyUs.subtitle: At J&R Footwear we take pride in offering high-quality products, backed by over 5 years of experience in the footwear industry.

reasons.nationalDesc: 100% Colombian production with the highest quality standards.
reasons.expDesc: Over 5 years manufacturing excellent quality footwear.
reasons.designDesc: Each collection is exclusively designed with current trends and timeless classics.
reasons.passionDesc: Each pair of shoes is made with dedication and quality control at every stage.

ctaFinal.title: Discover Our Complete Catalog!
ctaFinal.subtitle: Discover our complete collection and find the perfect footwear for your business. Quality, style and comfort guaranteed.

catalog.title: Product Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Explore our collection of high-quality footwear.
